query:
SELECT direction, trust_bucket, avatar_count
    FROM dbt.api_execution_circles_v2_trusts_distribution
    ORDER BY
      direction,
      multiIf(
        trust_bucket = '0',      0,
        trust_bucket = '1-5',    1,
        trust_bucket = '6-10',   2,
        trust_bucket = '11-25',  3,
        trust_bucket = '26-50',  4,
        trust_bucket = '51-100', 5,
        trust_bucket = '100+',   6,
        99)
